# Transcrição: 16-How to Set Up Naming Conventions

- **Fonte:** 16-How to Set Up Naming Conventions
- **Duração:** 01:13
- **Idioma:** en
- **Modelo:** small

---

## [00:00 - 01:13]

So, when you're building out your funnel, what you're going to do is give each campaign, each step essentially in that funnel a stage, right? And you're also going to be naming what kind of audience. So is it top of funnel, middle of funnel, bottom of funnel, etc. This is what we call naming conventions. And this is really important because when you go inside of your ad account and you start to build these, what you should be aiming to do is keep the same naming conventions as you would in the funnel that you mapped out. So for example, when I'm creating this campaign, I would call this campaign stage one, TOF cold audience, or I could call it stage one, TOF conversion, for example. And then this one, I would name this campaign stage two, BOF conversion, for example. I could name it stage two BOF messenger, if that made it clear for me. But the main premise is that your ad account needs to be organized in such a way that it's very, very obvious what each step is and how everything is organized.
